creator: jhb@FreeBSD.org
text:
For panic 1, can you go to the faulting frame (7) and do 'l'?

panics 2 and 3 look to be the same thing.  Can you adjust the faulting PC 
value you are passing to 'l*' up and down a bit until you get a file/line in 
the relevant C file and are no longer in atomic.h?

-- 
John Baldwin
